# Zora Agent Skills

> Skills for the Zora attention market. Wraps the Zora CLI for trending coins, creator tracking, portfolio management, and momentum trading.

## Documentation

- [Full docs (for agents)](https://zora-agent-skills.vercel.app/llms-full.txt): Complete reference in one file
- [Skill catalog API](https://zora-agent-skills.vercel.app/api/skills): JSON skill catalog
- [API discovery](https://zora-agent-skills.vercel.app/api): All endpoints
- [Agent discovery](https://zora-agent-skills.vercel.app/.well-known/ai.json): Machine-readable metadata

## Skills

- [Trend Scout](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/fraser-stanley/zora-agent-skills/main/trend-scout/SKILL.md): Trending topic coins, new launches, volume leaders
- [Creator Pulse](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/fraser-stanley/zora-agent-skills/main/creator-pulse/SKILL.md): Creator coin ecosystems, featured creators, watchlists
- [Briefing Bot](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/fraser-stanley/zora-agent-skills/main/briefing-bot/SKILL.md): Structured market digest with portfolio awareness
- [Portfolio Scout](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/fraser-stanley/zora-agent-skills/main/portfolio-scout/SKILL.md): Local wallet coin holdings
- [Momentum Trader](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/fraser-stanley/zora-agent-skills/main/momentum-trader/SKILL.md): Auto-buy trending coins with safety rails
